achievements.name: Destined For Great Things

achievements.name: Improve My Effectiveness

achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the first week

achievements.name: Vanity & Alteration
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the second week

achievements.name: Hunted & Chaos
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the third week

achievements.name: Love & Crime
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the fourth week

achievements.name: Secret & Escape
achievements.requirement: Release a mod featuring both themes in the fifth week

achievements.name: No N'wah Allowed
achievements.requirement: Release a mod using only vanilla assets

achievements.name: Tamriel Imports
achievements.requirement: Release a mod requiring either OAAB_Data or Tamriel_Data

achievements.name: You and I Are About to Become Very Close
achievements.requirement: Cooperate with at least one other modder to release a Modathon mod.

achievements.name: Double Trouble
achievements.requirement: Release at least 2 mods for Modathon

achievements.name: Novice of Madness
achievements.requirement: Release your first mod for a Modathon

achievements.name: Veteran of Madness
achievements.requirement: Release a mod in two or more Modathons

achievements.name: CHIMming It
achievements.requirement: Release a mod in three or more Modathons

achievements.name: Ahh yes, we've been expecting you
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on May 1st.

achievements.name: May the Fourth Be With You
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on May 4th

achievements.name: May The Ides Be Ever In Your Favor
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on May 15th

achievements.name: Cutting It Close
achievements.requirement: Release a mod on June 1st or 2nd

achievements.name: Backup Plan
achievements.requirement: Release two or more mods within 48 hours of each other

achievements.name: Back For Another Round
achievements.requirement: Release two mods in the same category

achievements.name: Ice And Chitin
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which places a creature with an exoskeleton in Solstheim

achievements.name: The Hope of the Redoran
achievements.requirement: Release a Redoran Stronghold Mod for the Modathon

achievements.name: What's Mine Is Mine
achievements.requirement: Release a mod with a mine that the player can own and/or operate

achievements.name: Exterminator
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which requires the player to kill at least 10 of the same creature or monster

achievements.name: Dreams And Visions
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which includes an in-game video of a dream or vision

achievements.name: Fundamental Attributes
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which affects the players health, magicka, or fatigue

achievements.name: The Good Daedra
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which includes at least one friendly daedra which is not summoned by the player

achievements.name: Meow
achievements.requirement: Release a mod involving cats. Or Khajiit. What's the difference?

achievements.name: Dunmer Cooking Secrets
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds a recipe for a prepared Dunmer meal

achievements.name: The Stranger
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds a non-hostile NPC without a proper name

achievements.name: Barbarian's Sad Tale
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds a naked Nord barbarian

achievements.name: Nothing Left
achievements.requirement: Release mods which collectively cover all 11 Modathon categories

achievements.name: Strange Devices
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds some type of Dwemer device

achievements.name: AIIEEE
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which involves death by falling

achievements.name: A Friend In Deed
achievements.requirement: Release a mod that let's the player hire an NPC or creature

achievements.name: Friend or Traitor
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which lets the player choose to betray someone

achievements.name: Blood Ties
achievements.requirement: Release a mod which adds a blood relative to an existing NPC
